REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1806 Silver Ave, Sf Ca 94124)
Off Calendar May-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Melissa Karlsten for (co-administrators) Barbara Glenn & Dametria Johnson.

Ms. Karlsten reported that she filed a reappraisal for sale this morning and provided a copy to the Court. The sale for 100% interest was confirmed at $630,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 4/27/16. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required as the funds will be placed into blocked accounts. Ms. Karlsten is aware that multiple accounts will be necessary. Status on filing receipts for funds placed into blocked accounts is set for June 22, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
